prompt: Hey, can you take a look at my draft and leave comments? Don't edit anything directly.

assertions.text: Uses [!comment] callout syntax (not HTML comments or %% or inline notes)
Comments placed after paragraphs, not mid-paragraph
Includes @author and date in each comment
Uses appropriate type tags ([edit], [question], [flag]) where warranted
Includes re: field referencing the text being commented on
